Randy Bigdickenson, also known as Big Dick Randy, Big D Randy, Big Randy, simply Randy or by the initials BDR, is the titular main antagonist of the music franchise by pop artist DigBar.

He is a serial rapist/killer who rapes and murders people on Halloween and other major holidays. Unfortunately for you, you're his next victim. What will you do?
